name: EmbedFixer
short: Fix social media embeds with webhook reposts.
description: Watches for supported social media links, suppresses embeds on the original message when possible, and posts a fixed-link copy through a webhook using the original author's display name and avatar. Includes a button to try another fixer service when alternatives exist.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: EmbedFixer loaded. Use `[p]embedfixer` to inspect settings, `[p]embedfixer on|off` to control automatic fixing, and `[p]embedfixer optout` if a user wants their messages ignored.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild-level settings for whether embed fixing is enabled and per-member opt-out flags. It does not store message content.
